svg.title: Precursa — self-healing supply chain architecture (light)
svg.desc: Top-down architecture on white background: data sources, Kafka, Flink, AI ensemble, DRI score, graph rerouting, autonomous agent, three action nodes, ops dashboard.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does Precursa ingest weather data?')
sendPrompt('What port feed data does Precursa use?')
sendPrompt('What IoT and GPS signals does Precursa use?')
sendPrompt('How does geopolitical risk data feed Precursa?')
sendPrompt('What customs API data does Precursa use?')
sendPrompt('How does the Kafka event bus work in Precursa?')
g.text: Confluent Cloud · real-time pub/sub · 10+ live streams

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does Apache Flink do in Precursa?')
g.text: Sub-second stateful · event windowing · anomaly pre-filtering

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the PyTorch LSTM model predict disruptions?')
sendPrompt('How does Isolation Forest detect anomalies in Precursa?')
sendPrompt('How does XGBoost classify disruption risk?')
sendPrompt('What is the Disruption Risk Index and how is it used?')
sendPrompt('How does the graph rerouting engine work in Precursa?')
g.text: Modified Dijkstra · ranks by cost, ETA, risk & carbon · top 3 routes per shipment

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the LangGraph autonomous agent work in Precursa?')
g.text: Agentic rerouter · books carriers · updates warehouse slots · notifies customers

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does Precursa auto-book alternate carriers?')
sendPrompt('How does Precursa sync warehouse slots?')
sendPrompt('How does Precursa notify customers of reroutes?')
sendPrompt('What does the Precursa ops dashboard show?')
g.text: Ops dashboard & AI copilot — React + Mapbox GL JS
Shipment map · DRI heatmap · alerts · Claude API copilot for natural language Q&A

svg.text: Click any node to explore · dashed lines = feedback loops
